## 任务 4: claw-rl v2.7.0 发布

### GitHub Release
🔗 https://github.com/opensourceclaw/claw-rl/releases/tag/v2.7.0

### 新增功能

#### 1. context_filter 参数

from claw_rl import LearningLoop

loop = LearningLoop(data_dir=Path('~/.openclaw/workspace/.learnings'))

# 无过滤 - 返回所有规则
all_rules = loop.get_recent_learnings(limit=10)

# 有过滤 - 仅返回包含关键词的规则
filtered_rules = loop.get_recent_learnings(
